title: Top 20 Must-See Movies of 2017
description: The article lists the top 20 movies of 2017, including "Get Out," "Dunkirk," "The Shape of Water," "Lady Bird," "Blade Runner 2049," "The Big Sick," "Logan," "Baby Driver," "The Florida Project," "Three Billboards Outside Ebbing, Missouri," "The Disaster Artist," "Wonder Woman," "The Post," "Call Me by Your Name," "The Beguiled," "The Killing of a Sacred Deer," "Wind River," "The Meyerowitz Stories (New and Selected)," and "Mudbound."

title: 2017 in Review: Major Events and Tragedies
description: The article lists major events that occurred in 2017, including the inauguration of Donald Trump, terrorist attacks in London and Manchester, a missile strike on a Syrian airbase, a white supremacist rally in Charlottesville, and the repeal of net neutrality rules in the United States.
keywords:
Topics: 
- Inauguration of Donald Trump 
- Terrorist attack in London 
- Missile strike on Syrian airbase 
- Suicide bombing in Manchester 
- General election in the United Kingdom 
- Fire at Grenfell Tower 
- United Nations treaty banning nuclear weapons 
- White supremacist rally in Charlottesville 
- Earthquake in Mexico 
- Shooting at music festival in Las Vegas 
- Catalonia declaring independence from Spain 
- Shooting at church in Texas 
- Resignation of Zimbabwe's President Robert Mugabe 
- Recognition of Jerusalem as capital of Israel 
- Repeal of net neutrality rules 
- Tax overhaul in the United States 
- Bus crash in Mexico 
- Protests in Iran 
- Shooting at nightclub in Istanbul

title: 2017 Oscar Winners: Moonlight, La La Land, and More
description: The article lists the winners of the major categories at the 2017 Academy Awards, including Best Picture for Moonlight, Best Director for Damien Chazelle, and Best Actor for Casey Affleck.
